steps.title: Compare the elevations
steps.content: The previous sentence says snowpack was deepest in early March at lower elevations. The blank introduces a different timing at higher elevations, where snowpack was deepest in mid-March. The transition must signal contrast.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast transitions
steps.content: A signals a restatement, but the second finding is not the same idea in different words. B signals an example, but higher-elevation data is not an example of lower-elevation data. D signals summary, but the sentence adds new information. The answer is C.
